description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the hashicorp/terraform:light Docker image with a custom entrypoint of /usr/bin/env and an explicit PATH, caches the .terraform directory, and defines a PLAN variable set to plan.tfplan. Add a validate stage containing a validate job that runs terraform validate. Add a build stage with a plan job that runs terraform plan -out=$PLAN and publishes the $PLAN file as an artifact named plan. Add a deploy stage with an apply job that depends on the plan job, runs only on the master branch, is manual, runs terraform apply -input=false $PLAN, and targets the production environment. All jobs execute before_script steps terraform --version and terraform init.
